## Feature summary

What would you like to add or improve?

## Use case

Why is this useful?

## Proposed behavior

Describe how it should work.

## Device considerations

Does this affect touch watches, button watches, AMOLED, MIP, Solar, or all devices?

## Screenshots / mockups

Attach examples if relevant.
